objection: We already use AWS extensively. Why should we consider IBM solutions when AWS has similar offerings?
We're heavily invested in Microsoft Azure. How does IBM integrate with our existing Azure infrastructure?
We've standardized on Google Cloud Platform. Why add another vendor to our stack?
IBM solutions seem expensive. How can we justify the additional cost to our leadership team?
You're recommending multiple IBM products. Won't this add complexity to our environment?
We already use Snowflake for our data platform. Why would we need IBM Cloud Pak for Data?
Our teams are trained on Tableau. How does IBM's analytics stack compare?
We have significant on-premises infrastructure. Can IBM solutions work in a hybrid environment?
You've recommended several IBM products. How do they work together, and won't this be difficult to implement?
How long will it take to implement these solutions? We need quick wins.
What kind of support does IBM provide? Our team is small and we need hands-on help.
We've been looking at competitors like Datadog and Splunk. What makes IBM different?
